name: Cheese Stuffed Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off of the rolls and hollow them out, leaving a thin shell.
2. Grind all of the ingredients (cheddar, green olives, bell peppers, tomato sauce, and onion) in a meat grinder or food processor until finely ground.
3. Stuff the ground mixture back into the hollowed-out rolls.
4. Place the roll tops back on and secure them with toothpicks.
5. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 350 degrees F for about 45 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
